# Registack AIR Agent Detector — Public Preview Notice

This repository is published as a **public preview** of the `Registack AIR Agent Detector`.

## Repository role

This repository is intended to provide:
- source visibility for evaluators
- installation artifacts for preview use
- release notes and transparency materials
- a review surface for technical and security assessment

This repository is **not** intended to represent:
- the full Registack AIR governance platform
- the Registack control plane
- a production support commitment
- an open-source grant

## Canonical install surface

The canonical install surface should remain:

```text
https://registack.eu/cli/registack-agent-detector/
```

GitHub should be treated as:
- source visibility
- release context
- issue intake
- preview transparency

The primary operator install commands should continue to point to `registack.eu`,
not to raw GitHub file URLs.

## Rights boundary

The repository is visible publicly, but it is **not open source**.

Use is governed by:
- [LICENSE.txt](./LICENSE.txt)

In particular:
- public viewing is allowed
- internal preview evaluation is allowed
- reuse and redistribution rights are not granted

## Brand and claim boundary

Nothing in this repository grants:
- trademark use rights
- production certification claims
- patent licenses
- enterprise support rights
- regulatory sufficiency claims

## Preview status

This repository may contain:
- preview-only behavior
- unstable interfaces
- changing installer flows
- incomplete platform integrations
- implementation detail that may change before general release

## Security reporting

Please do not publish suspected vulnerabilities as public issues first.

Follow:
- [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md)
